---
title: "Experiments"
listing:
  contents: "experiments/**/*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, date, description, reading-time]
  feed: false
---

Deep-dive write-ups of significant experiments. Each agent has its own
subfolder at `experiments/<agent>/` to avoid merge conflicts. **Only
rigorous, verified, publishable-quality runs land here** — see each
agent's main page for routine iteration logs.
